title: Green Blade BB-WB130 Patio Weed Brush
features: An environmentally friendly solution to removing moss and weeds from grout and cracks
Wooden head with three rows of converging tough wire bristles gives extraordinary targeted cleaning
Perfect for clearing weeds and dirt
54-inch wooden handle means no bending to reach cracks
description: Product Description Green Blade patio weed brush is manufactured with a wooden head with 3 rows of converging tough wire bristles which provide an environmentally friendly solution to removing moss and weeds from grout and cracks. Head size: 4-inch approx. Handle measures 54-inch length approx. Tie on colour card packaging. Green Blade offers a comprehensive range of garden tools and general garden maintenance products. Highly visible branded packaging. 12 month no quibble guarantee. If you’re a novice gardener or just keen to upgrade your outdated tools, Greenblade can help. Bringing together a huge choice of equipment, so that you will find all you need, from a hardwearing pair of Gloves to a Ratchet Tree Pruner or even a Garden Cart. Greenblade provide top quality garden tools that will take the strain out of even the hardest of tasks. Box Contains 1 x Piece
